literature_anchor.implementation_anchor: Hermes-3 multi-component edge/SOL collisional closure family
literature_anchor.transport_review: Braginskii 1965 transport formulas for collisional magnetized plasmas

metrics.name: d_plus_ion_viscosity_peak
metrics.notes: d+ should retain active parallel ion-viscosity forcing on the prepared recycling state.

metrics.name: t_plus_ion_viscosity_peak
metrics.notes: t+ should retain active parallel ion-viscosity forcing on the prepared recycling state.

metrics.name: he_plus_ion_viscosity_peak
metrics.notes: he+ should retain active parallel ion-viscosity forcing on the prepared recycling state.

metrics.name: d_plus_t_plus_action_reaction_residual
metrics.notes: The collisional friction diagnostics for pair d+/t+ should satisfy action-reaction balance.

metrics.name: d_plus_e_action_reaction_residual
metrics.notes: The collisional friction diagnostics for pair d+/e should satisfy action-reaction balance.

metrics.name: t_plus_e_action_reaction_residual
metrics.notes: The collisional friction diagnostics for pair t+/e should satisfy action-reaction balance.

metrics.name: he_plus_e_action_reaction_residual
metrics.notes: The collisional friction diagnostics for pair he+/e should satisfy action-reaction balance.

metrics.name: pressure_species_conduction_time_finite_fraction
metrics.notes: All pressure-evolving species should retain finite conduction collision times on the prepared state.
